causal_chain.to: Increased kinetic energy of water molecules

causal_chain.from: Increased kinetic energy of water molecules
causal_chain.mechanism: Temperature is a measure of average kinetic energy

causal_chain.from: Water temperature reaches 100 degrees Celsius at sea level
causal_chain.to: Vapor pressure of water equals atmospheric pressure at sea level

causal_chain.from: Vapor pressure of water equals atmospheric pressure at sea level
causal_chain.mechanism: Boiling occurs when vapor pressure overcomes atmospheric pressure
